chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2745 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge For hearing of bail application 14.01.2025. Mr. Ghulam Muhammad, advocate for applicant Ms. Rahat Ahsan, Addl. P.G. a/w SIP Muhammad Nazir P.S. Preedy = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Muhammad Naeemuddin is seeking pre arrest bail in Crime No.201/2024 U/s 320, 427, 279, 322 PPC of P.S. Preedy, Karachi. Applicant is present on interim pre arrest bail and matter is fixed for confirmation or otherwise. 2. As per brief facts, it is alleged in FIR that on 27.03.2024 when brother of complainant namely Danish alongwith one Sanaullah were riding the motorcycle were hit by a Bus being driven by co-accused Inayatullah near M.A. Jinnah Road towards Tower, Garden. As a result of which, both died. Co-accused Inayatullah, initially absconder, has been arrested and is in jail. Applicant is owner of the Bus and has been implicated in this case under the charge that he gave his Bus to such a person who had no valid license to drive it. Whether applicant in the circumstances can be charged u/s 322 PPC or not is a question to be decided by the trial court. This argument, learned defence counsel has emphasized for seeking pre arrest bail which has been rebutted by learned APG and legal heirs of deceased present in court. 3. In any case, applicant is owner of the Bus and not the driver. He was not present at the spot when incident took place. His liability u/s 320 and 322 PPc is a question which requires further inquiry and is yet to be determined at the time of trial, hence this application is allowed and the ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions.

He was not present at the spot when incident took place. His liability u/s 320 and 322 PPc is a question which requires further inquiry and is yet to be determined at the time of trial, hence this application is allowed and the ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
